title: Solana Market Snapshot: January 27, 2025
summary: Daily analysis of Solana market trends, volume surges, and emerging token patterns. Key focus on liquidity flows and smart money behavior.

sections.heading: Market Overview
bullets: Total tracked tokens: 850+ with SOLRAD scoring active
Daily volume: $2.4B across DEXs, up 18% from yesterday
New token launches: 47 contracts detected, 12 passed initial screening
Liquidity inflows concentrated in established meme sector tokens

bullets: Tokens with 100%+ volume increase show concentrated whale accumulation patterns
Mid-cap tokens ($1M-$10M) outperforming large caps in 24h gains

Smart money wallets rotating from beta tokens to established projects
